data.title: test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh: harvest-worktree.sh contains relative path refs -> test fails in full suite
data.description:
## Incident Overview
test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh fails in the full test suite with exit code 1.

## Actual Behavior
test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh fails because harvest-worktree.sh contains relative path references that violate the no-relative-paths policy.

## Expected Behavior
All plugin scripts should use absolute paths (via _PLUGIN_ROOT or _PLUGIN_GIT_PATH). harvest-worktree.sh should be updated to use absolute paths.

## Reproduction
bash tests/run-all.sh (pre-existing failure — unrelated to staged changes, confirmed by test gate)

## Context
Observed during sprint worktree-20260412-173956. Prior closed ticket 0fc6-c970 addressed a related harvest-worktree.sh issue but this failure persists.
